nasb.text: Even though they hire allies among the nations, Now I will gather them up; And they will begin to diminish Because of the burden of the king of princes.

esv.text: Though they hire allies among the nations, I will soon gather them up. And the king and princes shall soon writhe because of the tribute.

cnv.text: 他們雖然在列國中賄買人， 我現在卻要招聚他們。 他們因著君王和領袖所加的重擔， 逐漸衰微。

ccb.text: 尽管他们在各国贿买盟友， 如今我却要把他们聚集起来，审判他们。 他们必因君王和首领的欺压而日渐衰微。
